rules.rule_text:
rule generic_jsp
{
	meta:
		description = "Generic JSP"
		family = "JSP Backdoor"
		filetype = "JSP"
		hash = "6517e4c8f19243298949711b48ae2eb0b6c764235534ab29603288bc5fa2e158"

	strings:
		$exec = /Runtime.getRuntime\(\).exec\(request.getParameter\(\"[a-zA-Z0-9]+\"\)\);/ ascii

	condition:
		all of them
}
